title: Pael's Wing
description: You may sacrifice card rewards to Pael. Every [blue]2[/blue] sacrifices, obtain a [gold]Relic[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Displays a counter showing progress toward the next relic grant. When card rewards are sacrificed, the counter increments. Upon reaching the sacrifice threshold, a random relic is obtained and the counter resets.
